---
title: "Lecture title"
subtitle: "Applied Differential Privacy"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: white
    slide-number: true
    embed-resources: false
    code-overflow: wrap
    scrollable: true
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
  echo: false
jupyter: python3
---

## First slide

Presentation deck source. Pair with `learn.ipynb` for the self-study surface.
